outfit_info.outfit_description: A multi-layered ensemble features a black t-shirt, blue denim-style shirt, and grey puffer vest, paired with light-wash wide-leg jeans. Brown suede desert boots, a matching belt, and a black woven crossbody bag complete the comfortable and practical look, ideal for a casual outdoor setting.

model_attributes.body: Lean physique, well-groomed hair, and a warm, approachable expression, suggesting a relaxed confidence.
model_attributes.pose: Standing casually with a slight turn, holding a coffee cup, looking right with a pleasant, natural smile.
model_attributes.background: Rolling green hills under a cloudy sky, with a rustic stone wall and people in the distance.
